title: エル争奪！最強タッグ決定戦！！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After El Condor Pasa's amazing performance at the tryouts...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been training with new trainers every day, going through their
proposed training programs.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, who wants to present me with their training program today?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll do any exercise, no matter how tough! Be strict! Show no mercy!
I'm lookin' forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text: Finally! Today's my turn, El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Sprint one lap, then jog the next! Then repeat this one hundred times!
It's the same program the world champion does!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the world champion?! Then it's good, great, perfect for me!
Let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That day, El Condor Pasa, who hasn't even debuted yet, does the
same training that the world champion does...

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
At last, today is my turn! You see, I've been working with a certain
university lab that works on developing cutting-edge training
equipment.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
And from that lab came this training cast! It's a brilliant device that
puts twenty times your normal weight on your body!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Cutting-edge? Twenty times? Brilliant?! I don't really get it,
but it sounds cool! Let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another day, El Condor Pasa covers her entire body in a mysterious
training cast...

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
What does one need to take on the world?! It's passion! Zeal! An
unbreakable will! Come, let us yell unto the horizon, El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! I like your passion! Understood! I'll give it a go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I am the one! The only! The indomitable fighter! The lightspeed
storm! The strongest in the world—El Condor Pasaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This time, she's yelling at the setting sun until her throat goes dry. No
matter the training, she seems to takes it all in stride...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until one day, I spot El Condor Pasa walking with a slight wobble in
her gait.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whew... Sleepy... Spinning... I'm... dizzy...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? El, aren't you overworking yourself recently?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mmngh? Not... at all. I'm fine, fit as a fid—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh man, I'm so sorry! My legs wobbled for a second there.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wait a sec! You're... the line cutter! What a coincidence!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, nothing to worry about at all! As you can see, I'm an
energetic, motivated, and unparalleled condor—

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: O-ow! G-Grass?! That was way too pinpoint to be an accident!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gosh... My apologies. Are you hurt anywhere?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As of late, El has been undergoing rough training with a new trainer
every day, so it appears she is quite spent.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: W-w-whoa, Grass-Grass-Grass?! I can't pretend like I didn't hear that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm always telling you, aren't I? That I'm the world's strongest racer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The condor soars the skies so that one day it may carve its name in the annals of history! That's its future—my future!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So I can't! Stop! Now! No way am I gonna complain when I'm just
getting started!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are, El! I've come up with a program for you! Please
train with me today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Look! Another potential partner is here for me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And with that, I bid you adios! Grass, see you tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, wait a—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Before that, I almost forgot! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You must be reeeally taking your time with my program... Isn't that
right? I totally get it! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm eagerly waiting for your training program! Anyways, this time for
real. Chao!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ah... She said her fill and then immediately left. Same as usual, I
suppose.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And today, just like always, she'll spend the day with a new trainer
aiming to be the world's strongest.
choice_data_list: She's a determined one, isn't she?
She's a determined one, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hm... It might be more accurate to say she is stubborn... But I suppose
so.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She sets huge goals for herself without any fear, and she'll do
anything to make those goals reality. I respect that part about her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However... I believe even that side of her can become detrimental at
times.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes... At the very least, by working with a new trainer every day, her
fatigue from the previous day is not being taken into consideration.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Therefore, her fatigue has only continued to build up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
...If things get dangerous, I won't hesitate to stop her by force. After
all, she is not the type of person to stop after a mild scolding.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Which reminds me, are you not also trying to scout El yourself?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It may be impertinent of me, but I implore you to give what I have
told you some thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even without Grass Wonder's advice, it's clear that El Condor Pasa
has a strong will and an even stronger desire to train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As a trainer, what can I do to help make her dreams come true?
